title: Programmer-ish Dummy
description: A simple resource pack that gives the target dummy from MmmMmmMmmmmm an alternative look. (best when used with Programmer Art and Golden Days)
body:
This pack simply provides an alternative look for the target dummy from [MmmMmmMmmmmm](https://modrinth.com/mod/mmmmmmmmmmmm) by MehVahdJukaar and Plantkillable.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Best used with Programmer Art and other Programmer Art related resource packs.**

# Credits
MehVahdJukaar and Plantkillable | Creators of MmmMmmMmmmmm and the target dummy's texture

Mojang | Creator of the oak log texture and the iconic creeper face
